content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-086)

## CRITICAL / HARD GATE — blueprint-writer BEFORE any prover at FLANK
The lvb-checker returned **3 major blueprint-side findings** on the consolidated chapter
`Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`; the L1′/FLANK chapter is loose-to-wrong on the comparator-realization
layer. **Do NOT send a prover at FLANK until a blueprint-writer round + a scoped blueprint re-review
clears the gate.** Writer directive must:
1. Fix `def:presheaf_pullback_unit_eta` — it asserts `p = η(pullback φR)` / `\mathlibok` / "Provided by
   Mathlib", but the Lean realizes `presheafPullbackUnitIso = (H1.app 𝟙_X).symm ≪≫ q` (the H1
   reconciliation). Add a `\lean{...presheafPullbackUnitIso}` block (or rewrite prose) and drop/relax
   `\mathlibok`. (`% NOTE` already added iter-086.)
2. Fix `def:presheaf_pushforward_unit_eps` — `\lean{}` points at lax `ε` but the Lean uses strong
   `εIso` + the un-blueprinted `presheafPushforwardBetaMonoidal`. Blueprint `presheafPushforwardUnitIso`
   (q) + `presheafPushforwardBetaMonoidal` (the enabling strong-monoidality). (`% NOTE` added iter-086.)
3. Expand the `lem:presheafdualunitiso_pullback_natural` proof sketch to PREVIEW the real FLANK
   obligation: the sectionwise `ε`/`η` value of the composite `pushforward β = pushforward₀OfCommRingCat
   ⋙ restrictScalars β` (carrier-diamond-heavy). The current prose only gives the
   `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` analogy and would leave a prover blind to the actual residual.

Authorize the writer with `references/**` (may need `analogies/eta-plumbing.md` context). After the
writer + green build, fast-path a scoped blueprint-reviewer on this chapter to clear the gate this iter.

## CRITICAL — run progress-critic (K≥5) on the dual-flank BEFORE the next prover lane
This is the **7th consecutive dual-flank iter (080–086)** and the sorry count went **UP** (2→3) this
iter. The advance is genuine (the multi-iter "L1′ missing construction" wall is eliminated; residual is
ONE named bounded FLANK), but the planner is the worst-positioned judge of churn-vs-progress here.
Dispatch progress-critic with the K=5 signal table (sorry counts: …3→3→3→2→2→3; helpers added per iter;
PARTIAL×7). If it returns CHURNING/STUCK, the corrective is effort-break + blueprint, NOT another grind.

## Closest-to-completion / promising
- **FLANK `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural` L1273** is the sole new residual and the whole dual-flank
  frontier now rides it (L2′ + telescope in `TensorObjInverse.lean` consume L1′). It is a SINGLE
  sectionwise identity with a verified opening (`erw [sliceDualTransport_app_apply]`) and a concrete
  finish recipe. **Approach (after blueprint gate):** effort-break or SOLO `prove` building a
  **sectionwise `ε`/`η` value lemma for `pushforward β`** (unit-side analogue of
  `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`; template `analogies/eta-plumbing.md` §1
  `restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_η_app_one`), bypassing the carrier diamond, then close FLANK by
  `linearEndo_apply_comm`-style commutativity of comm-ring endomorphisms (exact idiom of
  `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`, DualInverse.lean:317). If a SOLO `prove` of FLANK stalls, effort-break
  it — do NOT re-grind monolithically (carrier-diamond `simp`/`letI` is DEAD).

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (blueprint — for the planner, do NOT author prose yourself)
`archon dag-query unmatched` newly lists 3 lean_aux decls with NO blueprint `\lean{}` block (all in
`PresheafDualPullback.lean`, all sorry-free):
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.presheafPushforwardBetaMonoidal` (L1121) — strong monoidality of
  `pushforward β`; deps: `restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective`, `presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal` (or
  `pushforward₀OfCommRingCat` strong), `Functor.Monoidal.comp`, `ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.presheafPushforwardUnitIso` (L1153, q) — realizes
  `def:presheaf_pushforward_unit_eps`; deps: `presheafPushforwardBetaMonoidal`, `Functor.Monoidal.εIso`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.presheafPullbackUnitIso` (L1177, p) — realizes
  `def:presheaf_pullback_unit_eta` UP TO H1; deps: `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`,
  `Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq`, `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`, `presheafPushforwardUnitIso`.
These fold naturally into the writer round above (item 1/2).

## Lean hygiene (MEDIUM — prover/refactor, review can't edit .lean)
From lean-auditor `iter086` (3 major, all comment/style hygiene, non-blocking):
- `PresheafDualPullback.lean:312–314` — stale "FALLBACK: … leave body as `sorry` (as here)" inside the
  `presheafDualPullbackComparison` strategy block; the body is now axiom-clean ⇒ misleading. Strip on the
  next prover touch.
- `PresheafDualPullback.lean:770` — stale "-- DRAFT statement; …" above the closed
  `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict`. Strip.
- `PresheafDualPullback.lean:772` — `set_option maxHeartbeats 12800000` missing the required inline
  `-- reason` comment (LSP `linter.style.maxHeartbeats`). Add a one-line justification.
- Minor: unused simp args L992 / L1092-1093; several `by`→`:= rfl` (L353,858,863,872,1242,1281); stale
  planner-strategy `/- … -/` blocks on closed decls. Batch on the next prover touch; none block.

## Do NOT retry (durable negatives — see PROJECT_STATUS Known Blockers)
- `IsIso (η (pullback φR))` literal for p (= unproven D2' η-bridge) — use the H1 realization (DONE).
- `(asIso (LaxMonoidal.ε (pushforward β))).symm` for q (two-LaxMonoidal diamond) — use
  `Functor.Monoidal.εIso`.
- Stating L1′ at the Scheme-`dualIsoOfIso` level (statement-elaboration whnf-bomb; presheaf level is
  whnf-safe and is where L1′ now lives).
- Closing FLANK by full `simp`/`letI` unfold of the composite `pushforward β` `ε`/`η` (re-adds the
  restrictScalars carrier diamond) — build the sectionwise value lemma instead.
